title: Exodus and Ondo Launch 200+ Tokenized Stocks and ETFs on Solana
summary: Exodus and Ondo have launched a platform allowing users to trade tokenized versions of over 200 stocks and ETFs directly on the Solana blockchain. This move bridges traditional finance with blockchain technology, offering fractional ownership and 24/7 trading.
body:
Exodus, a popular crypto wallet, has partnered with Ondo to launch a new platform that enables trading of tokenized stocks and ETFs on the Solana blockchain. This initiative allows users to buy, sell, and hold fractional shares of traditional financial assets as blockchain-based tokens.

The platform initially supports over 200 stocks and ETFs, including major companies like Apple, Tesla, and the S&P 500 ETF. By tokenizing these assets, users can trade them 24/7, similar to cryptocurrencies, and benefit from fractional ownership, which lowers the barrier to entry for investing in high-value stocks.

This development is significant for everyday investors as it merges the accessibility of cryptocurrency trading with the stability of traditional financial markets. Users can now diversify their portfolios with tokenized assets without needing a traditional brokerage account. Additionally, the use of Solana's high-speed and low-cost blockchain ensures efficient transactions.

For those interested in exploring this new investment avenue, the platform is now live and accessible through Exodus wallets. Users can start trading tokenized stocks and ETFs immediately, taking advantage of the seamless integration between traditional finance and blockchain technology. This is a major step toward democratizing access to financial markets.
